title: Game Rules
subtitle: Gundam Card Game Comprehensive Rules Ver. 1.4.1 Summary
footer: Gundam Card Game Comprehensive Rules Ver. 1.4.1 (based on original text dated January 16, 2026)

deck.title: Prepare Decks
deck.desc: Prepare a Main Deck (50 cards) and a Resource Deck (10 cards) and shuffle each thoroughly.

order.title: Determine Turn Order
order.desc: Decide who goes first via rock-paper-scissors or another method.

firstHand.title: Draw Opening Hand
firstHand.desc: Each player draws 5 cards from the top of their deck as their opening hand.

mulligan.title: Mulligan (Optional)
mulligan.desc: Starting with the first player, each player may mulligan once. Return your entire hand to the bottom of your deck, redraw 5 cards, then shuffle. This is optional.
mulligan.note: The second player mulligans after the first player declares going first.

shield.title: Place Shields
shield.desc: Each player places 6 cards face-down from the top of their deck into the Shield Zone.
shield.note: Shields are stacked from front to outermost. Each counts as HP 1.

base.title: Place EX Base
base.desc: Each player places 1 EX Base token (AP 0 / HP 3) in their Base Zone.

exres.title: Place EX Resource (Second Player Only)
exres.desc: Only the second player places 1 EX Resource token in their Resource Area.
exres.note: This token compensates for the first player's draw advantage. Removed after use.

start.title: Game Start!
start.desc: The game begins with the first player's Start Phase.

active.name: Active Step
active.desc: Simultaneously active all rested cards on your field (Battle Area, Resource Area, and Base Zone).

start.name: Start Step
start.desc: Trigger effects with "At the start of your turn" activate.

draw.name: Draw
draw.desc: Draw 1 card from the top of your deck. If your deck reaches 0 cards, you lose at that moment.

add.name: Add Resource
add.desc: Place 1 card from the top of your Resource Deck face-up and active in the Resource Area.

main.label: Main Phase

play.name: Play Cards
play.desc: Pay costs to deploy units / deploy bases / set pilots / activate [Main] command effects.

activate.name: Activate [Activate·Main]
activate.desc: Activate [Activate·Main] effects when not in the middle of a unit attack.

attack.name: Unit Attack
attack.desc: Attack the opponent player or a rested opponent unit with an active unit.

main.note: Repeat any of the above 3 actions in any order as many times as desired. Declare "End Main Phase" to proceed to the End Phase.

action.name: Action Step
action.desc: Starting with the non-turn player, both players alternately activate [Action]/[Activate·Action] effects. Ends when both players pass consecutively.

end.name: End Step
end.desc: Trigger effects with "At the end of your turn" activate.

hand.name: Hand Step
hand.desc: If you have more than 10 cards in hand, discard cards until you have exactly 10.

cleanup.name: Cleanup Step
cleanup.desc: Effects lasting "this turn" expire. Resolve any triggered effects, then pass the turn to your opponent.

attack.name: Attack Step
attack.desc: Rest 1 active unit and declare a target: the opponent player or a rested opponent unit. [When Attacking] effects trigger.

block.name: Block Step
block.desc: The non-turn player may rest a unit with [Blocker] to redirect the attack target to that unit. Only once per attack.

action.name: Action Step
action.desc: Both players alternately activate [Action]/[Activate·Action] effects. Ends when both players pass consecutively.

damage.name: Damage Step
damage.desc: The attack resolves. In unit vs. unit battles, both exchange battle damage equal to their AP. When attacking the player, deal damage to shields in order.

battleEnd.name: Battle End Step
battleEnd.desc: All effects lasting "this battle" expire. Return to the Main Phase.

zones.clickHint: Click a zone card to see its location on the play sheet.
zones.outsideBoard: "{{name}}" is located outside the play sheet.
zones.handOutside: "Hand" is outside the play sheet (cards held in hand).
zones.handLabel: Hand — Outside play sheet, visible only to owner
zones.note:
When cards move between zones, they are treated as new cards unless otherwise specified (previous effects expire).
The Resource Area, Battle Area, and Shield Area are collectively called the "Field."

deck.name: Deck Area
deck.desc: Where your game deck is placed. Draw 1 card at a time from the top.

resourceDeck.name: Resource Deck Area
resourceDeck.desc: Where your resource deck is placed.

shield.name: Shield Area
shield.desc: Base Zone (public, ⑥) + Shield Zone (private, ③).

resource.name: Resource Area
resource.desc: Where resources are placed. Maximum 15 cards.

battle.name: Battle Area
battle.desc: Where units and pilots are placed. Maximum 6 units.

hand.name: Hand
hand.desc: Cards you have drawn. Maximum 10. Visible only to you.

trash.name: Trash
trash.desc: Destroyed or used cards. Order may be changed.

exclude.name: Exclude Area
exclude.desc: Excluded cards. Treated differently from destruction.

objective.title: Game Objective & Win/Loss Conditions

win.label: Win Conditions
conditions: Deal battle damage to the opponent with a unit while they have 0 cards in their Shield Area
Reduce the opponent's deck to 0 cards

lose.label: Loss Conditions
conditions: Receive battle damage while your Shield Area has 0 cards
Your deck reaches 0 cards (including at draw time)

objective.note:
If card text contradicts the comprehensive rules, card text takes priority.
Prohibition effects always take priority over permission effects.

deckRules.title: Deck Building Rules

mainDeck.label: Main Deck — 50 cards
rules: Consists of Unit / Pilot / Command / Base cards
Maximum 4 copies of the same card number

resourceDeck.label: Resource Deck — 10 cards
rules: No limit on copies of the same card number

level.name: Lv. (Level)
level.desc: A card can be played if your total resource count ≥ card's Lv. Active/rested resources both count.

cost.name: Cost
cost.desc: Rest the required number of active resources to pay the cost.

deckRules.note:
Resource Area maximum: 15 cards (including up to 5 EX Resources).
Hand limit: 10 cards (discard excess during End Phase Hand Step).

cardTypes.title: Card Types (5 Types)
cardTypes.note:
EX Base: A Base token with AP 0 / HP 3. Automatically placed in the Base Zone at game start.
EX Resource: A one-time-use Resource token. Given to the second player (1 copy). Removed after use.

unit.name: Unit
unit.desc: When played, place in the Battle Area. Maximum 6 units.
notes: Cannot attack on the turn it is deployed (except Link Units).
A Link Unit (pilot satisfying link condition set) can attack immediately on deployment turn.
HP reaches 0 → Destroyed → Sent to Trash.
The color of a unit in the Battle Area is unaffected by the color of a set pilot.

pilot.name: Pilot
pilot.desc: When played, set under a unit in the Battle Area. One pilot per unit.
notes: Text above card name → Pilot's own effects (usually [Burst]).
Text below card name → Effects granted to the set unit.
Pilot's traits are not added to the unit.
Cannot be voluntarily replaced or removed. Moves with the unit when the unit is moved.

command.name: Command
command.desc: When played, activate the command effect. Sent to Trash after activation (unless the effect specifies otherwise).
notes: While the effect is activating, the card is considered to not be in any zone.
If it has [Pilot]: Can be set as a pilot on a unit instead of activating the effect.
Cannot be played if no valid target can be selected for the command effect.

base.name: Base
base.desc: When played, place in the Base Zone of the Shield Area. Maximum 1 card.
notes: While a Base is present, damage dealt to the Shield Area is absorbed by the Base first.
HP reaches 0 → Destroyed → Sent to Trash.

resource.name: Resource
resource.desc: Placed directly in the Resource Area from the Resource Deck. Used to pay costs.
notes: Rest active resources to pay costs.
Level check counts all resources regardless of active/rested status.

turnFlow.title: Turn Flow
turnFlow.note:
If effects are triggered during any phase/step, resolve all of them before proceeding.
During an attack, playing cards from hand and activating [Activate·Main] effects are not allowed.

battle.title: Attacks & Battles
battle.attackConditionNote:
Attack conditions: Your own active unit. Cannot attack on the turn it was deployed (except Link Units).
Declare the opponent player or a rested opponent unit as the target.
battle.clickHint: Click a step to view its details.
battle.note:
If a unit leaves its zone at the end of the Attack Step or Block Step, skip to the Battle End Step.
[Blocker] can only be activated once per attack. The original attack target unit cannot activate [Blocker].

repair.timing: At the end of your turn
repair.desc: [Repair N]: Recover N at the end of your turn. If you have multiple, add the values together.

breakthrough.timing: During your turn, when an opponent unit is destroyed by battle damage
breakthrough.desc: [Breakthrough N]: When an opponent unit is destroyed by battle damage, deal N damage to the opponent's Shield Area. (Base absorbs first; if no Base, destroy 1 shield.) Does not trigger if the opponent has 0 shields/bases. Multiple copies stack.

support.desc: [Support N]: [Activate·Main] Rest this unit: Choose 1 other friendly unit. That unit gains AP +N this turn. Multiple copies stack.

blocker.desc: [Blocker]: During the Block Step, rest this unit to redirect the attack target to this unit. Once per attack. The original attack target cannot use [Blocker]. A unit cannot have multiple [Blocker] abilities.

firstStrike.desc: [First Strike]: Deal battle damage before the opponent in battle. If this damage destroys the opponent's unit/base, you do not receive counter-damage. A unit cannot have multiple [First Strike] abilities.

highMobility.desc: [High Mobility]: While this unit is attacking, opponent units cannot activate [Blocker]. A unit cannot have multiple [High Mobility] abilities.

suppress.desc: [Suppress]: When dealing battle damage to shields, deal damage to the top 2 shields simultaneously. If only 1 shield remains, only 1 is damaged. If both simultaneously destroyed shields have [Burst], the owner determines resolution order. A unit cannot have multiple [Suppress] abilities.

activateMain.desc: An activated effect that triggers during your Main Phase (excluding while a unit is attacking) when conditions are met.

activateAction.desc: An activated effect that triggers during the Action Step when conditions are met.

main.desc: Command cards only. Play during your Main Phase (excluding while attacking) to activate the command effect.

action.desc: Command cards only. Play during the Action Step to activate the command effect. Command cards with [Pilot] cannot be set as a pilot during the Action timing.

burst.desc: When a shield is destroyed and flipped face-up, you may activate the effect at no cost. Activation is optional. Activates before the shield is sent to Trash. [Burst] effects are resolved with highest priority among triggered effects.

onPlace.desc: Triggers when a card is placed.

onAttack.desc: Triggers when a unit declares an attack during the Attack Step.

onDestroy.desc: Triggers when a unit/base is destroyed by battle or an effect and placed in the Trash. Activates from Trash. Card state references the field state just before destruction.

onSet.desc: Triggers when a pilot is set on a unit. Conditions can be specified using "[When Set • Condition]" format.

whileSet.desc: Has an effect while a pilot is set. Conditions (traits, etc.) can be specified using "[While Set • Condition]" format.

onLink.desc: Triggers when a pilot satisfying the link condition is set.

whileLink.desc: Has an effect while a pilot satisfying the link condition is set.

oncePer.desc: Can only be activated once per turn. Even if multiple cards have the same effect, each may be activated once.

effects.title: Effect Types & Resolution
effects.note:
"Do" → Process as much as possible.　"May" → Activation is optional.
"If you did" → If the preceding text was not resolved, the following text cannot be resolved.　"Then" → The following text can be resolved regardless of whether the preceding text was resolved.

continuous.name: Continuous Effect
continuous.desc: Always active. Applied immediately when the card enters the relevant zone without waiting to trigger. If multiple conflicting continuous effects exist, prohibitions take priority.

triggered.name: Triggered Effect
triggered.desc: Automatically triggered when a specific event occurs. If triggered simultaneously, the turn player's effects resolve first. If new effects are triggered, resolve the newest first. [Burst] effects are resolved with highest priority.

activated.name: Activated Effect
activated.desc: Activated at the player's discretion. Format: "Condition : Effect". Activates when all conditions are met.

command.name: Command Effect
command.desc: Activated by playing a command card at the specified timing. Cannot be played if no valid target can be selected.

replacement.name: Replacement Effect
replacement.desc: Format: "Instead of (A), do (B)". Replaces event A with event B.

activeRest.def: Card placed vertically / Card placed horizontally. Applies to cards in the Field, Resource Area, and Base Zone.

place.def: To put a unit or base on the field.

set.def: A pilot card (or [Pilot] command) being placed under a unit.

destroy.def: Damage ≥ HP or effect causes the card to move from the field to Trash. When a shield is destroyed, flip it face-up to check [Burst] before sending to Trash.

exclude.def: Move from any zone to the Exclude Area. Treated differently from destruction.

discard.def: Move a card from hand to Trash.

draw.def: Secretly add the top card of your deck to your hand.

play.def: Reveal a card from your hand, pay its cost, and use it.

recover.def: Remove the specified number of damage counters from a unit/base. Cannot recover beyond maximum HP.

battleDamage.def: Damage resulting from battle resolution / Damage caused by card effects.

turnPlayer.def: The player whose turn is currently in progress.

slash.def: When used in traits, means "or". Example: [Zeon]/[Neo-Zeon] = either one.
